# Pull Request

## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Output format update
- [ ] Parser improvement
- [ ] Generator strategy adjustment

## Affected Areas

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `skills/testcase-generator/SKILL.md`
- [ ] `skills/testcase-generator/references/testcase_examples.md`
- [ ] `scripts/parsers/`
- [ ] `scripts/generators/`
- [ ] `scripts/formatters/`
- [ ] `scripts/utils/`

## Verification

- [ ] I verified the relevant input format still parses correctly
- [ ] I verified no undocumented API behavior was turned into a confirmed assertion
- [ ] I verified `断言来源` / `是否为假设` are still preserved where applicable
- [ ] I updated related docs if behavior or structure changed

## Test Plan

Describe how you verified the change.

Example:

- Input file used:
- Command executed:
- Output checked:

## Risks / Notes

- Does this change affect compatibility?
- Are there any known limitations?
- Is there any follow-up work needed?
